data.body:
Goal:
Make installed Foolery updates report the installed and latest versions, remove the installer command-list noise, and make foolery doctor locate the API when it is bound to a non-loopback interface; then publish the next patch release.

Verification:
1. Run focused launcher/installer tests and confirm update output shows installed and latest versions before updating and the resulting installed version afterward.
2. Run installer output tests and confirm no Commands: line is emitted.
3. Run doctor endpoint-discovery tests with localhost unavailable and another local interface reachable; confirm doctor succeeds against the reachable address and reports attempted endpoints when none respond.
4. Run bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build; all must pass.
5. Run the patch release workflow and confirm the public release has runtime tarballs and matching .sha256 files.

Constraints:
Use a dedicated worktree, preserve hermetic default tests by injecting host/network discovery, push final integrated changes to origin/main without a PR, and use the project release script.
data.title: Fix installed update and doctor discovery
